creator: timur@gnu.org
text:
Hi Rance!
 
 > ----- Forwarded message from Rance Hall <rance@frontiernet.net> -----
 > >Description:
 > the "make config" screen in the current samba3 port is broken.

 With best regards,
 Timur.
